key_risks: A sudden reversal in recent sector momentum could lead to underperformance.
Biotech is highly volatile and sensitive to specific company news or clinical trial results.
Regional banks remain sensitive to interest rate expectations and potential credit concerns.

portfolio.rationale: Biotech has shown strong recent momentum with an 8.74% 7-day return and 11.78% 30-day return, suggesting a potential short-term trend.
Regional banks have positive short-term momentum (1.46% 7-day, 6.02% 30-day) and may benefit from the current rate environment.
Small caps have shown resilience with a 1.11% 7-day return despite broader market weakness, indicating potential relative outperformance.

portfolio_rationale: This portfolio targets sectors with positive short-term momentum (Biotech, Regional Banks, Small Caps) to outperform the S&P 500 over a one-week horizon. These sectors have demonstrated recent strength despite broader market pullbacks.
rationale_summary: Allocating to Biotech, Regional Banks, and Small Caps based on their positive 7-day and 30-day returns, aiming to capture short-term momentum and relative strength against the S&P 500.
